mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 AND p.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT p.* FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND p.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT p.* FROM posts p INNER JOIN follows f ON p.user_id = f.followee_id INNER JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE f.follower_id = #{followerId} AND p.status = 1 AND p.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT p.* FROM posts p INNER JOIN post_ee e ON p.id = e.post_id INNER JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE e.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 AND p.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT p.* FROM posts p INNER JOIN post_likes l ON p.id = l.post_id INNER JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 AND p.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY l.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT * FROM posts WHERE audit_status = 0 AND deleted = 0 AND created_at < #{beforeTime} ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT p.* FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND p.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 1 AND p.like_count + p.comment_count + p.share_count > 0 ORDER BY (p.like_count * 3 + p.comment_count * 2 + p.share_count) / (GREATEST(1, TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, p.created_at, NOW())) + 2) DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT p.* FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND p.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 1 AND p.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
